title: BET - Block'n'Entity Tooltip
description: BET - Block’n’Entity Tooltip shows you the name of any block or entity you’re looking at in Minecraft, making it easy to identify what’s around you!
body:
### BET - Block’n’Entity Tooltip

All the information with F3 is too much and you are actually just interested in having just a small peek in what you are looking at? **BET** brings you a tooltip, simply look at any block or mob, and the name will appear on your screen instantly. No more guessing what that block is or wondering what mob you’re facing—**BET** gives you the name right on the game screen. No need to switch to another screen. Whether you're exploring, building, or just discovering, this mod makes your Minecraft experience smoother and more intuitive. Perfect for players of all levels who want quick, in-game knowledge!
